title: Intensely Jammy Indian Lamb Kachori
description: Tender lamb kachori filled with a sweet and spicy mixture, perfect for a date night dinner, featuring Turkish delight and steamed to perfection, this dish is egg-free friendly and sure to impress.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the lamb mince, chopped Turkish delight, onion, ginger, garlic, cumin seeds, and coriander powder, and mix well until just combined.
Cover the mixture and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
In a separate large mixing bowl, combine the all purpose flour and a pinch of salt, and gradually add in the ghee, mixing until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until it becomes smooth and pliable.
Divide the dough into 8-10 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Flatten each ball into a thin disk using a rolling pin.
Place a tablespoon of the lamb mixture in the center of each disk and fold the dough over to form a half moon shape, pressing the edges together to seal.
Steam the kachori in a steamer basket lined with parchment paper for 10-12 minutes, or until cooked through.
Serve the kachori hot with your favorite chutney or raita.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and a dollop of yogurt, if desired.
